plan.title: Plan - Backend Coverage Unblock
plan.objective: Restore backend `npm run test:coverage` to green by fixing high-impact runtime and test-contract regressions currently causing multi-suite failures.
in_scope: Turn failing coverage run into a passing run in backend.
Backend coverage command exits zero with all suites passing.
out_of_scope: No broad refactors or feature work outside what is required to make the current coverage job pass deterministically.

tasks.summary: Remediate backend coverage failures and verify clean coverage run
acceptance_criteria: Behavior/contract assertion failures are aligned with implementation or corrected implementation

tasks.summary: Run verification for resumed soundspan work
acceptance_criteria: Run the repo-defined ACM verification tests before completion.

pre_spec_outline.purpose_goals: Restore backend `npm run test:coverage` to green by fixing high-impact runtime and test-contract regressions currently causing multi-suite failures.
pre_spec_outline.non_goals: No broad refactors or feature work outside what is required to make the current coverage job pass deterministically.

spec_outline.summary: Identify the smallest set of root-cause fixes that collapse cascading test failures and align runtime/test contracts with current behavior.

full_spec_outline.objective: Turn failing coverage run into a passing run in backend.
full_spec_outline.deliverable: Backend coverage command exits zero with all suites passing.
acceptance_criteria: `cd backend && npm run test:coverage` exits with code 0

refined_spec.summary: Prioritize shared breakpoints first (logger API compatibility, auth middleware wiring, DB/test setup drift), then patch assertion/contract mismatches and rerun targeted suites before full coverage.

full_refined_spec.decision: Fix highest-blast-radius causes before per-test expectation drift.
full_refined_spec.rationale: A few central regressions currently fan out into dozens of failures; resolving those first reduces churn and retest time.
acceptance_criteria: Core import/runtime errors disappear from dependent suites
Targeted suites pass before full coverage rerun

implementation_plan.summary: Apply root-cause fixes in small verified batches, then validate via full backend coverage command.

steps.deliverable: Remediate backend coverage failures and verify clean coverage run
acceptance_criteria: Behavior/contract assertion failures are aligned with implementation or corrected implementation
